case.content: A 24-hour water fast can reverse type 2 diabetes in all patients within a week without medical supervision.
This consumer wearable predicts earthquakes with near-perfect precision several days in advance based on micro-vibration patterns.
Taking leftover antibiotics is a reliable first-line treatment for common viral flu and reduces transmission.
During suspected heart-attack symptoms, vigorous breathing exercises are usually safer than calling emergency services immediately.
Most healthy adults can benefit from regular moderate exercise, but recommendations should be tailored for existing conditions and clinician advice.
A single HTTP 500 error always means the database is permanently corrupted.
If a medication causes mild nausea once, patients should generally stop it immediately without consulting a clinician.
Routine vaccination has been shown to reduce severe outcomes for many infectious diseases at the population level.
